no_items: We couldn't find any questions right now. Try again — or snap some new material.

exit.title: End the session?
exit.saved_hint: Your progress is saved — you can pick up again any time.

offline_saved: Saved offline — it'll sync once you're back online.
offline_need_connection: I need a connection for that one. Try again in a moment.
keep_going_empty: That's everything for now — nicely done!

stream_error.generic: That didn't go through. Feel free to type your answer again.
stream_error.insufficient_credits: Today's credits are used up. We'll pick this up tomorrow.
stream_error.evaluation_failed: I couldn't answer just now. Give it another try.
stream_error.transcription_failed: I didn't quite catch that. Say it again or type it.
stream_error.empty_answer: There was no answer in there yet.

done.title: All done!
done.body: Great that you practised. Want to keep going?

stimulus.fallback: Diagram can't be shown right now

voice.permission_rationale: LearnBuddy listens briefly so you can answer out loud. Audio is never stored.
voice.unavailable: Voice isn't available yet — just type your answer for now.
voice.retry: Didn't quite catch that — tap to talk again.

explain.title: Explain this
explain.subtitle: What would you like to know?
explain.error: That didn't go through. Give it another try.
explain.hint: Tap a tab above and I'll explain it.
